reviews.review_title: just here to break the 5 stars
reviews.review_description:
The staff in this game are absolutely garbage, underaged and attack you if you don’t like the game. 

All of these reviews are fake, just staff members trying to make their game seem lovely. There is nothing to do except to get spam kicked by a five year old! Don’t download!!!

developer_response.body: Thank you for the review. Nobody in the reviews was forced or asked to rate the game 5 stars and only some of them are Staff. The people kicking you are most likely modders as the game has been modded and has been discontinued for a while. None of our real staff are underage as we are in compliance with the Meta Privacy Policy, Meta Terms of Service, and the Code of Conduct for Virtual Experiences. Thank you again.

reviews.review_title: A very chill and a relaxing game! ✨️
reviews.review_description: I love this game because the walking and running has more grip to the ground, but mostly that I really love and what I do everyday in Great ape is hangout, chill and make new friends! Also this game gets updates every once and a while. So i recommend getting this if your a chill person, Very Chilling, Very relaxing, Just the most fabulous game in my opinion. Big W a hundred percent! 🔥👍🏽💯

developer_response.body: We are trying to make It as less competitive as possible and more fun! We will have a ton of events In the future for people to have more fun. Thanks for the positive review! -Phoenic

reviews.review_description: I love this game personally I love the mining and horror this game is very small but very good so download this game right now or I will find you…

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review! We are working on the game and updating It all the time, and we love to hear your feedback! -Phoenic

reviews.review_description: this game is very fun and the staff team is nice to!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your positive review! We are working on the game to make It more fun. -Phoenic

reviews.review_title: Is game is the best game ever

developer_response.body: Thank you! We are actively updating this game to make it better. -Phoenic
Thank you SO SO much for leaving a review! We hope that other people think this too! -Phoenic
